message:
feat(lint): implement built-in structural and reference validation rules

Add 9 validation rules organized into two categories:

Structural rules:
- RequiredMetadataRule: checks for id, name, description
- ValidVersionRule: validates semver format
- UniqueSectionIdsRule: ensures unique section IDs
- UniqueBlockIdsRule: ensures unique block IDs within sections
- NonEmptyBlocksRule: warns about empty blocks

Reference rules:
- ValidExtendsRule: validates parent skill exists
- NoCycleRule: detects circular inheritance
- DeepInheritanceRule: warns about deep inheritance chains
- FormatVersionRule: checks format version compatibility

Also adds ?Sized bound to SkillRepository generic functions
to support trait object usage in validation context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
